chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.1012 of 2019 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ 1) For orders on M.A. No.6697/2019 (U/A) 2) For orders on M.A. No.6698/2019 (Exp/A) 3) For hearing of bail application ------------------------------ 19.07.2019 Ms. Zahida Majeed, advocate a/w applicant -------------------------------------------- Applicant/accused Attar Khan son of Habibullah seeks protective bail in F.I.R. No.169/2019, registered at P.S. Peerabad, Karachi West under sections 302, 324, 34, PPC read with section 7 of the Anti-Terrorism Act, 1997. It appears that protective bail was granted to the applicant/accused by this Court vide order dated 16.07.2019 for three days with direction to surrender before learned Judge Anti-Terrorism Court-II, Karachi in the aforesaid period and to join the investigation. Counsel for the applicant/ accused submits that the applicant/accused surrendered before the learned Judge, Anti-Terrorism Court-II, Karachi within the stipulated period but it appears from the order dated 18.07.2019 that accused and his counsel were called absent and pre-arrest bail was dismissed on account of non-prosecution. In the peculiar circumstances, protective bail for a period of four days from today is granted to applicant/ accused Attar Khan son of Habibullah, subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.100,000/- (Rupees one hundred thousand) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court.

Counsel for the applicant/ accused submits that the applicant/accused surrendered before the learned Judge, Anti-Terrorism Court-II, Karachi within the stipulated period but it appears from the order dated 18.07.2019 that accused and his counsel were called absent and pre-arrest bail was dismissed on account of non-prosecution. In the peculiar circumstances, protective bail for a period of four days from today is granted to applicant/ accused Attar Khan son of Habibullah, subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.100,000/- (Rupees one hundred thousand) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. Applicant/accused is directed to surrender before the learned Judge, Anti-Terrorism Court-II, Karachi, in the aforesaid period. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of four days from today or whenever the applicant/accused surrenders before the trial Court, which one occurs earlier. However, it is made clear in case applicant/accused fails to surrender before the trial court in the aforesaid period, his bail bond shall stand forfeited. Application is accordingly disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Gulsher/PS
